scripts.check: prettier package.json package-lock.json index.html README.md 'tasks/**/*.md' '*.{cjs,js,json}' 'src/**/*.{js,ts,vue,scss}' 'tests/**/*.js' --check && eslint config.js 'src/**/*.{js,ts,vue}' 'tests/**/*.js' '*.config.js' --ignore-path .gitignore --max-warnings=0
scripts.format: prettier package.json package-lock.json index.html README.md 'tasks/**/*.md' '*.{cjs,js,json}' 'src/**/*.{js,ts,vue,scss}' 'tests/**/*.js' --write && eslint config.js 'src/**/*.{js,ts,vue}' 'tests/**/*.js' '*.config.js' --ignore-path .gitignore --max-warnings=0 --fix
